data.raceName: DOWNLOAD THE TAB APP TODAY 3YO PACE MS
data.raceComments: {"comment":"11. SOHO WASHINGTON comes through the Gold Chalice series at Bathurst where he placed in the heats before finishing only 2.7m away in the consolation. Had been racing consistently at Menangle prior. Won the only time he raced here and will relish the class drop. 10. DEVIOUS MINDS raced parked but stuck on for a 2.3m third at Menangle last start. Tricky draw but has recorded a win and a placing in two previous attempts at this circuit and distance. Big chance. 9. CANTPLZA MALTEEZA was last seen in the NSW Breeders Challenge Blue Final seven months ago, the only time he has missed a place in nine starts. Won a heat of that series at Menangle prior. Placed in both previous fresh attempts and was readied with two trials. 5. STANNUM broke the maiden last time and could be ready to go through the grades.","runners":[11,10,9,5],"exclusive":false}
